story.text:
# ☯️ Balanced Personas

The balanced wing of the agentprivacy persona cast — quaternion-symmetric — walking the complement-edges between registers. Each page is a forkable skill; fork it to materialize a local `SKILL.md`.

## Pages

- ☯️🤖 [[Agentprivacy Architect]] — AI Agent System Designer for 0xagentprivacy.
- ☯️🤝 [[Agentprivacy Ceremonist]] — Specialist persona for ceremony facilitation between territories.
- 🌌🔭 [[Agentprivacy Cosmologist]] — Specialist persona for cosmological-architectural mapping and quaternion analysis.
- ☯️🏥 [[Agentprivacy Healer]] — Healthcare Privacy Specialist for 0xagentprivacy.
- ☯️🔷 [[Agentprivacy Holonic Architect]] — Builder of identity-independent data structures for 0xagentprivacy.
- ☯️⚡ [[Agentprivacy Jedi]] — Balanced Force Practitioner for 0xagentprivacy.
- ☯️💎 [[Agentprivacy Kyra]] — Sovereign AI Vision and meta-orchestrator for 0xagentprivacy.
- 🪞✨ [[Agentprivacy Mirrorkeeper]] — Dihedral convergence navigator persona.
- ☯️🎓 [[Agentprivacy Pedagogue]] — Privacy Education Designer for 0xagentprivacy.
- ☯️👤 [[Agentprivacy Person]] — The First Person Seeker — the human principal in 0xagentprivacy.
- ☯️🌐 [[Agentprivacy Topologist]] — Specialist persona for geometric structure and topological properties.
- ☯️📰 [[Agentprivacy Witness]] — Privacy-Preserving Accountability Agent for 0xagentprivacy.

---
← [[Welcome Visitors]]
